sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73521" key="o)mmatogra/fos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀμμᾰτο-γράφος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[γρᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n73521.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">painting</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">staining the eyes,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">στίμμις</foreign> Ion Trag.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1474.tlg001:25" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">25</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
